results.rendered_html:
praphulla adj. aufgeblüht, in Blüthe stehend, blühend  P. 8,2,55 , Sch.  VOP. 26,101 .  AK. 2,4,1,7 .  H. 1128 .  MBH. 1,6068 . 3,10248 . 11530 . 5,7154 . 7,3722 . 13,2829 .  HARIV. 15771 .  R. GORR. 2,4,14 .  KUMĀRAS. 3,45 . 7,11 .  RAGH. 2,29 . 6,69 .  ṚT. 6,1 . 32 .  KATHĀS. 19,63 .  Spr. 987 .  MĀRK. P. 61,25 . 31 . mit Blumen bedeckt: taḍāga  HARIV. 1124 . sarāṃsi  R. GORR. 2,70,12 . weit geöffnet wie eine aufgeblühte Blume: ˚netra  ŚATR. 14,337 . [Page4-1034]
— Vgl. phulla.

results.rendered_html:
praphulla p. p.
1 Full-blown, blossoming, blooming; na hi praphullaṃ sahakārametya vṛkṣāṃtaraṃ kākṣati ṣaṭpadālī  R. 6. 69 ; 2. 29 ;  Ku. 3. 45 ; 7. 11. 
2 Expanded or dilated like a full-blown flower (as eyes).
3 Smiling.
4 Shining.
5 Gay, cheerful, pleased.
Comp.
— nayana, -netra, -locana a. with eyes expanded with joy.
— vadana a. having a beaming or cheerful countenance, looking cheerful.
